arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Kendra thesaurus.

created_at.description: The date and time when the thesaurus was created.

description.description: A description of the Kendra thesaurus.

error_message.description: The error message if there was an issue with the thesaurus.

file_size_bytes.description: The size of the thesaurus file in bytes.

id.description: The unique identifier for the Kendra thesaurus.

name.description: The name of the Kendra thesaurus.

role_arn.description: The ARN of the IAM role used by the thesaurus.

source_s3_path.description: The S3 path where the thesaurus file is stored.

status.description: The current status of the Kendra thesaurus.

synonym_rule_count.description: The number of synonym rules in the thesaurus.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the Kendra thesaurus.

term_count.description: The number of terms in the thesaurus.

updated_at.description: The date and time when the thesaurus was last updated.
